docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY GAO, ZHONGHU AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAO, ZHONGHU AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-21-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ZHONGHU GAO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CLAIMED THAT PARTIES ENTERED INTO AN AGREEMENT AND NON APPEARANCE ON HEARING DATE WILL BE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-17-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-21-2026 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
*REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM* FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF GAO, ZHONGHU
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** BY REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
*SC-109* AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR STEVEN WONG TO APPEAR FOR UBER TECHNOLOGIES FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
